name: service registration and availability creation

testSteps.description: Given that I am on the service registration page
When I enter the "Corte de Pelo" and the "Servicio de peluquería profesional" about the service

children.description: Daniella enters 'Corte de Pelo' into Name
Daniella enters 'Servicio de peluquería profesional' into Description

testSteps.description: And I create an availability slot for the registered service

children.description: Daniella selects Corte de Pelo (ACTIVO) on Service select for availability
Daniella enters '2026-06-08' into Availability date input
Daniella enters '08:00' into Availability start time
Daniella enters '09:00' into Availability end time

userStory.storyName: as a user, I want to register a service with its basic information so I can offer it
